paths.title: Transformers, From Attention to LLMs
paths.blurb: How a sequence of words becomes a large language model, one mechanism at a time.

paths.title: How a Modern LLM Is Trained
paths.blurb: The pipeline from raw text to an aligned assistant: pretraining, fine-tuning, and preference optimization.

paths.title: Reasoning and Test-Time Compute
paths.blurb: How models think before they answer, and why spending compute at inference buys accuracy.

paths.title: Classic Machine Learning Foundations
paths.blurb: The pre-deep-learning bedrock every engineer should still know cold.

paths.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
paths.blurb: Grounding a model in your own documents: embed, retrieve, rerank, generate.

paths.title: Generative Models for Images
paths.blurb: From autoencoders to diffusion transformers, the road to text-to-image.

paths.title: Serving LLMs Efficiently
paths.blurb: What it takes to run a large model fast and cheaply in production.

paths.title: AI Safety and Security
paths.blurb: Aligning models and defending the systems built on them.

paths.title: Mathematics for Machine Learning
paths.blurb: The linear algebra, calculus, and probability that everything else is built on.

paths.title: Deep Learning Building Blocks
paths.blurb: The pieces a neural network is made of, and how it learns.

paths.title: Agents and Tool Use
paths.blurb: Turning a model into a system that plans, acts, and uses tools.

paths.title: Reinforcement Learning
paths.blurb: Learning to act from reward, from the Bellman equation to deep RL.

paths.title: Mechanistic Interpretability
paths.blurb: Reverse-engineering what is actually happening inside a trained network.

paths.title: The Philosophy of Mind and AI
paths.blurb: The old questions about minds that AI makes newly urgent.

paths.title: Evaluating AI Systems
paths.blurb: How the field measures models, from classic metrics to the modern, contamination-resistant benchmarks.

paths.title: Probabilistic Machine Learning
paths.blurb: Modeling uncertainty: from Bayes to latent variables, variational inference, and sampling.

paths.title: Advanced Optimization
paths.blurb: Past plain gradient descent: momentum, second-order methods, and the geometry of optimization.

paths.title: The Theory of Deep Learning
paths.blurb: Why networks that should overfit instead generalize, and the surprises that came with scale.

paths.title: Learning Theory
paths.blurb: The formal account of what it means to learn from data and when generalization is possible.
